sentences.arabic: أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ الصَّدَاقَةَ الْحَقِيقِيَّةَ نِعْمَةٌ كَبِيرَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Smatram da je pravo prijateljstvo velika blagodat.
sentences.translationEn: I believe that true friendship is a great blessing.

sentences.arabic: الصَّدِيقُ الْحَقِيقِيُّ يَقِفُ مَعَكَ فِي الْأَوْقَاتِ الصَّعْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pravi prijatelj stoji uz tebe u teškim vremenima.
sentences.translationEn: A true friend stands by you in difficult times.

sentences.arabic: لَيْسَ مُهِمًّا أَنْ يَكُونَ لَكَ أَصْدِقَاءُ كَثِيرُونَ.
sentences.translationEn: It is not important to have many friends.

sentences.arabic: الْمُهِمُّ أَنْ يَكُونَ لَكَ صَدِيقٌ وَاحِدٌ صَادِقٌ.
sentences.translation: Važno je imati jednog iskrenog prijatelja.
sentences.translationEn: What matters is to have one honest friend.
